sql-case.value: SELECT order_id, COUNT(1) count FROM t_order o GROUP BY order_id HAVING count > 1 ORDER BY order_id
WITH t_order_tmp AS (SELECT * FROM t_order o) SELECT * FROM t_order_tmp

WITH cte1(status, user_id) AS (SELECT status, user_id FROM t_order a), cte2(user_id, item_id) AS (SELECT user_id, item_id FROM t_order_item b) SELECT status, user_id, item_id FROM cte1 INNER JOIN cte2 ON cte1.user_id = cte2.user_id
WITH t_order_tmp (col1, col2, col3, col4, col5, col6) AS (SELECT * FROM t_order o) SELECT col1 FROM t_order_tmp

WITH user_orders AS (SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS order_cnt FROM t_order GROUP BY user_id), user_info AS (SELECT user_id, user_name FROM t_user) SELECT ui.user_name, uo.order_cnt FROM user_info ui LEFT JOIN user_orders uo ON ui.user_id = uo.user_id ORDER BY ui.user_id, ui.user_name
SELECT user_id, user_name, email FROM t_user ORDER BY 2 ASC, 1 DESC
SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_id <= 12 UNION ALL SELECT merchant_id FROM t_merchant WHERE merchant_id <= 12 ORDER BY 1 DESC
WITH user_cte (uid, uname, uemail) AS (SELECT user_id, user_name, email FROM t_user) SELECT uid, uname, uemail FROM user_cte ORDER BY uid
WITH t_user AS (SELECT user_id, UPPER(user_name) AS user_name, email FROM t_user WHERE user_id <= ?) SELECT * FROM t_user ORDER BY user_id
SELECT order_id AS orderId, (SELECT orderId) AS tempOrderId FROM t_order
SELECT * FROM (SELECT user_id, user_name FROM t_user WHERE user_id <= 10 UNION SELECT merchant_id, merchant_name FROM t_merchant WHERE merchant_id <= 5) AS combined(id, name) ORDER BY id
SELECT t1.user_id, t1.user_name, t2.order_id, t2.creation_date FROM t_user t1 LEFT JOIN t_order t2 ON t1.user_id = t2.user_id WHERE t1.user_name = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.user_id GROUP BY u.user_id HAVING u.user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT o.order_id FROM t_order o, t_order_item i WHERE o.order_id = i.order_id(+)
